content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Apr 24, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 24 focused on expanding the LifeOps multi-calendar stack, optimizing frontend performance, and maintaining dependency health. Key achievements include full support for multi-calendar Google feeds and significant reductions in redundant frontend polling. The team also addressed critical model ID configuration errors and refined agent action correction logic to improve reliability across the framework.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**LifeOps and Calendar Integration**
*   Completed the LifeOps multi-calendar stack, enabling the listing, persistence, and merging of multiple Google calendar feeds.
*   Implemented safety fallbacks to handle hosted cloud latency.
*   Relevant PR: [#7072](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7072)

**Frontend Performance and Reliability**
*   Reduced excessive frontend polling across the MusicPlayer, ChatView, and ConversationsSidebar to improve resource efficiency.
*   Refined `findOwnedActionCorrectionFromMetadata` to ensure `SPAWN_AGENT` actions are preserved against metadata corrections.
*   Relevant PRs: [#7077](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7077), [#7075](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7075)

**Configuration and Dependency Maintenance**
*   Corrected malformed Anthropic Haiku model IDs that were causing API 404 errors.
*   Performed widespread dependency updates, including `@elizaos/core`, `telegram`, `vite`, `vitest`, and various React-related packages.
*   Relevant PRs: [#7078](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7078), [#7069](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7069), [#7087](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7087), [#7088](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7088)

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   **Agent Logic & Messaging:** [#7098](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7098), [#7097](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7097), [#7096](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7096), [#7090](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7090), [#7079](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7079)
*   **System & Infrastructure:** [#7095](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7095), [#7094](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7094), [#7092](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7092), [#7089](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7089)
*   **Configuration & Dependencies:** [#7093](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7093), [#7091](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7091), [#7083](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7083)
*   **Documentation:** [#7074](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7074)

## CLOSED ISSUES

**Decentralized Agent Interaction**
*   Closed the request for trustless agent-to-agent deals via local ZK proofs, addressing the need for private state verification between agents.
*   Relevant Issue: [#7073](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7073)

## NEW ISSUES
*   No new issues were reported today.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   There are currently no active issues with more than 3 comments.
